creator: dominique.goncalves@gmail.com
text:
Hi

On Fri, 8 Dec 2006 09:11:11 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/gnomebaker,
>
> Please note that PR ports/106470 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106470

Thanks for submiting a patch!
The patch looks good but it needs "USE_GSTREAMER=vorbis mad flac" and
a small update to pkg-plist. All files/ are removed.

Patch:
http://djdomics.free.fr/FreeBSD/gnome/patches/gnomebaker-0.6.1.diff

> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Regards.

-- 
There's this old saying: "Give a man a fish, feed him for a day. Teach
a man to fish, feed him for life."
